zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Lady of Wales於1188年出生在法國時，她的父親John King of England22歲，母親Clemence19歲。她於1204年3月23日與Llywelyn ab Iorwerth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1237年2月2日在威爾士凱爾納方史爾阿享年49歲，埋葬在威爾士安格萊利安法斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Lady of Wales于1188年出生在法国时，她的父亲John King of England22岁，母亲Clemence19岁。她于1204年3月23日与Llywelyn ab Iorwerth结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1237年2月2日在威尔士凱爾納方史爾阿享年49岁，埋葬在威尔士安格萊利安法斯。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Lady of Wales was born in 1188, in France, her father, John King of England, was 22 and her mother, Clemence, was 19. She married Llywelyn ab Iorwerth on 23 March 1204. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 2 February 1237, in Aber, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 49, and was buried in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Lady of Wales est née en 1188, à France, son père, John King of England, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Clemence, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Llywelyn ab Iorwerth le 23 mars 1204. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1237, à Aber, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Lady of Wales 1188 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John King of England 22 und ihre Mutter Clemence 19. Sie hat am 23. März 1204 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1237 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Aber, Caernarfonshire, Wales und wurde in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Lady of Wales è nata il nel 1188 nel Francia, sua padre, John King of England, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Clemence, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Llywelyn ab Iorwerth il 23 marzo 1204. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1237, nel Aber, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Lady of Walesが1188年にフランスで生まれた時，父John King of Englandは22歳，母Clemenceは19歳であった。1204年3月23日にLlywelyn ab Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1237年2月2日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアアバーで49歳で死去し，ウェールズアングレセイランファスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Lady of Wales(이)가 1188년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John King of England(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1204년 3월 23일 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 2월 2일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 압어에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 앤글레시 랜파이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Lady of Wales nasceu em 1188, em França, seu pai, John King of England, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Clemence, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Llywelyn ab Iorwerth em 23 de março de 1204. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1237, em Aber, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanfaes, Anglesey, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Lady of Wales родилась в 1188 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени John King of England было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Clemence, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 23 марта 1204 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 2 февраля 1237 г. в местности абир, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности лланфаесь, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Lady of Wales nació en 1188, en Francia, su papá, John King of England, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Clemence, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Llywelyn ab Iorwerth el 23 de marzo de 1204. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1237, en Aber, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Llanfaes, Isla Oscura, Gales.
